title: Natours Backend API
description: Engineered a RESTful backend API for a tour booking platform using Node.js and Express, implementing secure authentication (JWT) and advanced query features within a MVC architecture.

title: Use Popcorn
description: Developed a React application for movie tracking with external API integration, enabling users to search, rate, and persist watched movies using efficient state management.

title: React Quiz App
description: Built a dynamic quiz application using React with structured state management (useReducer), supporting real-time scoring and user interaction flows.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Designed and developed a responsive portfolio website using React, showcasing projects and technical skills with a clean and user-focused interface.
